name: pg-mcp-server
description: PostgreSQL MCP Server for Claude – stdio & HTTP

scripts.version: node --input-type=commonjs -e "const fs=require('fs');const a=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('openapi.json'));a.info.version=process.env.npm_new_version;fs.writeFileSync('openapi.json',JSON.stringify(a,null,2)+'\n');" && sed -i "s/^version: .*/version: $npm_new_version/" helm/pg-mcp-server/Chart.yaml && sed -i "s/^appVersion: .*/appVersion: \"$npm_new_version\"/" helm/pg-mcp-server/Chart.yaml && git add openapi.json helm/pg-mcp-server/Chart.yaml
